description: A low-cloud contrast case for layer-like cloud behavior near the lower atmosphere.
physical_question: How do surface moisture, cap height, and weak mixing favor lower cloud layers instead of isolated shallow cumulus?
learning_goals: Contrast layer-like low cloud with baseline shallow cumulus.
Inspect cloud base/top and cloud-water distribution.
intended_behavior: A low-cloud or stratus-like setup for later CM1 validation.
expected_behavior: A lower, broader cloud layer may develop if moisture and stability support it.

controls.label: Surface moisture
controls.description: Relative moisture supply near the surface.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should adjust near-surface moisture or surface-flux assumptions.

controls.label: Mixing / entrainment
controls.description: Relative mixing with air above the lower cloud layer.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should document how this control affects idealized setup assumptions.

expected_diagnostics.max_updraft: record weak or layered vertical velocity signals

cm1_template.mapping_notes: Placeholder mapping until local CM1 validation.

visualization_defaults.camera: low orbit view with horizontal slice emphasis

limitations: Low-stratus behavior requires local/manual CM1 validation.
